keys.description: shared internal secret the /internal/validate endpoint requires (fail-closed guard, main.py). Unset, gateway's validation hop 503s and every API-key check fails — so the boot refuses instead of coming up green and rejecting every call (the 2026-04-23 failure shape, #526).
admin bearer for the privileged admin surface; stock surfaces default it (compose 'changeme', helm/lite from env). Change it for any real deploy.
PostgreSQL password (dev default; change for any non-local deploy)
explicit SQLAlchemy URL override; when unset the URL is built from the DB_* parts. Provided as a lite entrypoint export, not a per-surface env.

SQLAlchemy async-engine pool_size (persistent connections per pod). Pure runtime override — reconcile with deploy/db-budget.json (Σ replicas × (pool_size + max_overflow) + reserved ≤ max_connections) on managed Postgres. #635.
SQLAlchemy async-engine max_overflow (burst connections above pool_size per pod). Pure runtime override — reconcile with deploy/db-budget.json. #635.

bounded initial-DB-connect retry: max attempts before failing loud. On a cold start where Postgres DNS isn't resolvable yet, the boot retries the first connect instead of exit(3)-ing into the k8s restart loop (#901). After this many attempts it re-raises.
bounded initial-DB-connect retry: base backoff seconds (capped-exponential: base×2^(n-1), clamped to DB_CONNECT_MAX_DELAY). #901.
bounded initial-DB-connect retry: max backoff seconds per attempt (the exponential is clamped here). #901.
dev conveniences toggle; does NOT relax the INTERNAL_API_SECRET requirement (a missing secret refuses boot even in dev — the 04-23 lesson).
